name: Orbit Technologies Ltd
summary: Orbit Technologies Ltd provides airborne communications, and satellite-tracking maritime and ground-station solutions in Israel and internationally. It provides airborne, maritime, and rail mobile satcom products; and tracking and telemetry products, including aeronautical test telemetries and antenna control units. The company also offers EO satellite tracking and remote sensing, and pedestals ground station solutions; and airborne audio solutions. In addition, it provides turnkey solutions. The company was founded in 1950 and is headquartered in Netanya, Israel.
